{{CargoRelic
|name=Hercules the Archer
|class_id=22531
|rank=AA
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-03
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.12%)
|description=On May 3, 1909 AD, Bourdelle completed this statue.<br>Hercules the Archer is one of the representative works of the French sculptor Bourdelle. Unlike the Academic style sculptures that attempt to reproduce the perfect human form, this statue shows a solemn and monumental character, using the curve of the bow and the exaggerated body shape to present the beauty of this hero's strength and display the artist's unique creative skills.
|fame=31
|art=68
|fth=41
|civ=49
|tech=39
|ss1=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +80<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +8
|ss2=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +12
|ss3=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +16
|ss4=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +240<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +24
|ss5=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +32
|ss7=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +32<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill II.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion ATK +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's ART +10
}}
